_meta.source_policy: PDF-derived learning content; story structure and characters are model_inference.

spoiler_policy: Safe summaries only. Final route/result and decisive dialogue are sealed.

sessions.title: Qualifier: The Space Before the Answer

official_briefing_safe.topic: state vectors, operators, and density operators
official_briefing_safe.what_not_to_assume: Do not treat non-commuting operators like ordinary algebraic variables.

sessions.drama_safe_summary: Seiran's captain smiles at the oscillator board as if the next round has already begun.
sessions.inheritance_progress_safe: The team begins turning basic questions into a shared standard.

sessions.title: Semifinal Pool: Light With Teeth

official_briefing_safe.what_not_to_assume: Do not assume bright, coherent, number, and thermal fields have the same photon statistics.

sessions.drama_safe_summary: A cross-examination ticket arrives from Kuroha Academy: reservoir memory permitted.
sessions.inheritance_progress_safe: The team learns to connect formal models with physical light-matter behavior.

sessions.title: Repechage: The Silent Reservoir

official_briefing_safe.topic: open quantum systems, cavity loss, and propagation conditions
official_briefing_safe.what_not_to_assume: Do not assume dissipation is a small afterthought; it can decide the observable result.

sessions.drama_safe_summary: Akebono's borrowed textbook is open to the chapter on qubits.
sessions.inheritance_progress_safe: The inherited question becomes a safe public checkpoint about assumptions.

sessions.title: Finalist Selection: Information That Cannot Be Copied

official_briefing_safe.topic: qubits, gates, no-cloning, entanglement, and protocols
official_briefing_safe.what_not_to_assume: Do not assume entanglement sends usable messages faster than classical communication permits.

sessions.drama_safe_summary: The finalist board is covered before anyone can read the route.
sessions.inheritance_progress_safe: Team explanation becomes part of the inheritance theme.

sessions.title: Final Session: The Device That Has To Be Real

official_briefing_safe.topic: algorithms, error correction, and physical implementation
official_briefing_safe.what_not_to_assume: Do not claim scalable computation from a single elegant effect.

sessions.drama_safe_summary: The exact final result and ending route are sealed to preserve spoiler control outside play.
sessions.inheritance_progress_safe: The final public structure asks for synthesis without revealing the sealed result.
